title: Gild N' Glisten
body:
**Hello! This is my first _(of hopefully many!)_ mods for Minecraft!**

The goal of this mod is to provide **Glistering Melon Slices** as a good mid-end game food source on par with golden carrots, as prior they have little to no use outside of brewing potions (and distracting piglins!)

Glistering Melon Slices will feed you around 3 hunger, and can always be eaten.  However, at the cost of providing no saturation, _they heal you for around 2 hearts of health!_ Cool right?

This mod also introduces a new block, the **_Gilded Melon!_**
The Gilded Melon is a gold variant of the Melon block that can be crafted primarily by using 9 glistering melons, just like normal melons!
Gilded Melons require an axe of iron or higher tier to break, and yield **3-7 Glistering Melon Slices**, just like a normal melon!
Also just like a normal melon, you can use fortune to rack up to 9 Glistering Melon Slices from a Gilded Melon!

**The last 2 items added respectively are the Melon Plating, and Melon Plating Mold.**

The **Melon Plating** can be used on a placed/grown Melon Block to _convert it instantly into a Gilded Melon!_ (This feature was primarily to help with automation from various other mods!)

The **Melon Plating Mold** is the item required to craft a Melon Plating.
This item is crafted by forming a ring out of 4 iron ingots, and 4 iron nuggets. Craft the Melon Plating Mold in the middle of a _Gold Bar_ and a _Bucket of Lava_ to recieve a Melon Plating!
This recipe will also return the Melon Plating Mold and a Empty Bucket in the crafting grid!

I can't wait to see what people do with this mod, happy crafting ^^
